title: 大阪杯の後に・眼光炯々

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki has an immensely satisfying race!
Her obsession sets her fighting spirit ablaze, and
she can feel the blaze fierce and water still
perfectly balanced within her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, she hasn't quite managed to steal the
audience's hearts. While there are some who
acknowledge her performance, the majority are
wishing Oguri Cap was there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is convinced that she has to defeat
Oguri Cap. She also believes she has what it takes
to best her now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to make the Yasuda Kinen our next
goal. There, she'll face off against Oguri Cap.
